Items.Title: Messi sets new World Cup scoring record, Mbappé and Haaland respond, Kane up today
Items.Description:
June 23 – Lionel Messi’s brace drove Argentina to a 2-0 win over Austria to guarantee their progress to the round of 32, on the way him becoming the all-time leading scorer in World Cup history.
Against Australia his hattrick saw him Miroslav Klose’s longstanding men’s record. His 18th World Cup goal against Austria took him past Brazilian Marta’s overall record.
Messi, who has now scored in six consecutive World Cup matches,
 Read more …
The post Messi sets new World Cup scoring record, Mbappé and Haaland respond, Kane up today appeared first on Inside World Football.

Items.Title: Lionel Messi World Cup goal should be overturned as VAR mistake called out
Items.Description: Lionel Messi broke the World Cup's all-time goalscoring record against Austria, but Peter Schmeichel has claimed the goal should have been disallowed
Items.Author: Daniel Orme,Matty Hewitt

Items.Title: All the angles of Messi's record-breaking goal
Items.Description: Watch all the angles of Lionel Messi's record-breaking opening goal against Austria in Argentina's 2-0 victory.
